THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PETRI, IRAN $12,338.65 PRINCIPAL, $110.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $12,448.65, IT IS ORDERED THAT TE AWARD OF RODNEY ESHELMAN,JILL MONDRY, MARJORIE PRIEST, ARBITRATORS, DATED OCT.3,1994, IN THE SUM OF $12,338.65 IS CONFIRMED IN ALL RESPECTS AND THAT JUDGMENT BE ENTERED IN CONFORMITY THEREWITH.
